question: Which language instruction best describes the robot's trajectory shown in the image?
choices: Pick up the blue square from the floor
put the blue square into the transparent cup and the orange squares into the white cup
Place the blue square on the tray
Drop the transparent cup into the surface
correct_choice: put the blue square into the transparent cup and the orange squares into the white cup
